title: VS Code inserting 'Co-Authored-by Copilot' into commits regardless of usage
author: indrora
aiHeadline: VS Code now forces you to share credit with Copilot, whether you like it or not.

title: Why does it take so long to release black fan versions?
author: buildbot
aiHeadline: Why does it take forever to release black fan versions? Because apparently, they're waiting for the next iPhone to be black too.

title: Ask.com has closed
author: supermdguy
aiHeadline: Ask.com has closed, proving that sometimes, the internet just moves on, leaving behind relics like flip phones and MySpace.

title: NetHack 5.0.0
author: rsaarelm
aiHeadline: NetHack finally releases version 5.0.0, proving that good things come to those who wait... or maybe just those who didn't give up on ASCII art.

title: Dav2d
author: dabinat
aiHeadline: Dav2d: the latest in video decoding technology, because apparently, we needed another one.
